substep.title: Confirm Merge Commit Is on Target

check.action: Halt with: "Post-merge verification failed: commit {{merged_commit}} is not an ancestor of {{target_branch}}. The merge may have produced an unexpected state. Inspect with `git log {{target_branch}} --oneline -5`."

substep.title: Confirm Worktree Is Removed

check.action: wt merge should have removed the worktree as part of its cleanup phase. If it survives, attempt manual removal:
Warn (do not halt): "Worktree {{branch}} survived wt merge and could not be auto-removed. Inspect with `wt list` and remove manually. Merge itself succeeded."

substep.action: Store {{worktree_removed}} = true if removed, false otherwise.
